blended.narrative: Aspen Snowmass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 6,300 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
